indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Seating arrangement with tables and chairs obstructs open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: bar counter
indicators.rationale: Bar counter obstructs open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: lighting fixtures
indicators.rationale: Circular lighting fixtures provide even illumination suitable for yoga.

indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches obstruct open floor space required for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The hardwood flooring and lighting fixtures support yoga, but the seating arrangement, bar counter, and couches obstruct open floor space required for yoga. A score of 3 rather than 4 reflects the obstruction of open floor space by furniture.
